tools.name: diligence_brief
tools.description: Generate a distressed-SMB DILIGENCE BRIEF for an acquisition target. Pass the business name (+ optional US state and domain). Combines REAL public-data signals: lawsuits & bankruptcy dockets (CourtListener/PACER), held-inventory recall exposure (CPSC), federal exclusion/sanctions (OFAC SDN + OIG LEI

tools.name: quick_scan
tools.description: FREE quick signal scan for a target business: distress/liability counts + a one-line go/caution/stop verdict, with no per-item detail. The teaser a buyer runs on a listing.

tools.name: check_recall_exposure
tools.description: FREE: check a business name against CPSC product-recall records — the held-inventory / recoverable-recall liability line. Returns matched recalls with hazard + units.

tools.name: ch11_feed
tools.description: Fresh CHAPTER 11 FIREHOSE for the restructuring/creditor bar. Returns new business reorganization filings (newest-first) across the major bankruptcy venues, each with the debtor's-counsel firm + attorney, presiding judge, docket number, filing date and a CourtListener link. Args: days (lookback, def

tools.name: ch11_preview
tools.description: FREE preview of the most-recent Chapter 11 business filings — case headers only (name, court, filing date, docket link). The teaser for the restructuring lane.
